subcodes.first_line: The primary purpose underlying the creation of the world hath been the recognition of the Ancient Beauty; whoso attaineth unto this station hath attained unto all good [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود اصلی از خلق عالم عرفان جمال قدم بوده هر نفسی باینمقام فائز شد بکل خیر
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @being a source of light; guidance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
